name: hot_swap_protocol_v1
description: Hot-swap protocol dataset covering atomic adapter replacement with zero downtime inference. 2000 examples spanning the full two-phase swap lifecycle: preload, stage, atomic swap, rollback, RCU-deferred retirement, concurrent request handling, multi-adapter group swaps, and VRAM budget enforcement during swap windows.

entries.notes: 2000 hot-swap protocol examples across five subcategories: normal_swap_sequence (400), rollback_scenarios (400), concurrent_request_handling (400), multi_adapter_swaps (400), vram_budget_during_swap (400)

provenance.review_notes: Hot-swap protocol training data derived from AdapterTable, HotSwapManager, and RCU retirement infrastructure. Covers two-phase swap, rollback invariants, concurrent inference pinning, group atomicity, and VRAM budget enforcement with eviction.

evaluation_gates: VRAM budget calculations during swap window accurate >= 95%
intent: Train the model to reason correctly about adapterOS hot-swap protocol: the two-phase preload-then-swap lifecycle, atomic pointer-flip semantics, rollback safety guarantees, RCU-deferred cleanup of retired adapters, concurrent request pinning via generation-tagged refcounts, multi-adapter group swap atomicity, and VRAM budget enforcement including eviction under pressure.

protocol_phases.preload: Load adapter weights into VRAM, enter staged state, allocate refcount entry
protocol_phases.stage_validation: Verify BLAKE3 hash matches expected, confirm VRAM estimate nonzero
protocol_phases.atomic_swap: Save rollback state, validate all add_ids in staged, clone active map, apply removes then adds, atomic generation bump via AtomicUsize::swap, install new AdapterStore index, retire old stack
protocol_phases.rollback: Restore active map from rollback_state, revert generation counter, re-install AdapterStore index, retire failed stack, consume rollback state
protocol_phases.rcu_retirement: Old stack enters retired_stacks queue, background task polls refcounts, cleanup when all refs drain to zero, max 3 retries before quarantine
